Class ExpireChanges<K>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.core.ExpireChanges<K>
public class ExpireChanges<K> extends Object
Value Object linking a number of keys to their ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState retaining the order of the original source. Dedicated higher level methods interpret raw values retrieved from a Redis Client.
  1. ok() returns keys for which the time to live has been set
  2. expired() returns keys that have been expired
  3. missed() returns keys for which the time to live could not be set because they do not exist
  4. skipped() returns keys for which the time to live has not been set because a precondition was not met
Since:
3.5
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static <K> ExpireChanges<K> of(List<K> fields, List<Long> states)
      Factory Method to create ExpireChanges from raw sources.
      Type Parameters:
      K - the key type used
      Parameters:
      fields - the fields to associated with the raw values in states. Defines the actual order of entries within ExpireChanges.
      states - the raw Redis state change values.
      Returns:
      new instance of ExpireChanges.

    • stateChanges

      public List<ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState> stateChanges()
      Returns:
      an ordered List of the status changes.

    • stateOf

      public @Nullable ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState stateOf(K key)
      Returns:
      the status change for the given key, or null if ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState does not contain an entry for it.

    • allOk

      public boolean allOk()
      Returns:
      true if all changes are ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.OK.

    • allChanged

      public boolean allChanged()
      Returns:
      true if all changes are either ok ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.OK or ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.EXPIRED.

    • ok

      public Set<K> ok()
      Returns:
      an ordered list of if all changes are ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.OK.

    • expired

      public Set<K> expired()
      Returns:
      an ordered list of if all changes are ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.EXPIRED.

    • missed

      public Set<K> missed()
      Returns:
      an ordered list of if all changes are ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.DOES_NOT_EXIST.

    • skipped

      public Set<K> skipped()
      Returns:
      an ordered list of if all changes are ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState.CONDITION_NOT_MET.

    • allMach

      public boolean allMach(Predicate<ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState> predicate)
